hard_rules: this recording is the phone itself
there is no second phone anywhere
the front camera of this same phone is already recording
do not show another phone in her hand
the shocked reaction must be visible by the third second
the hand-to-mouth gesture must be visible
after the reaction, she must physically pull the recording phone closer to her face as if trying to read the screen better
the frame must tighten because the phone moves physically closer, not because of fake zoom
goal: Create raw front-camera footage where an American blonde girl reacts with shock by the third second, then physically brings the recording phone closer toward her face as if rereading or inspecting something on the screen.

scene.subject: American blonde girl in her early 20s
scene.lighting: soft practical room light, ordinary and unstyled
scene.style: real raw front phone camera footage, not aesthetic

beats: the phone is resting and already recording from the front camera
medium close framing
she reads something on this phone screen
minimal movement
the shock reaction visibly builds and lands within this window
eyes widen
eyebrows lift
mouth opens slightly
one hand clearly comes up and covers part of her mouth
hold the shocked expression by the third second
while still shocked, she reaches toward this same recording phone
she grabs it and gently pulls it closer toward her face
the frame shifts and tightens because the recording phone is moving closer
the motion should feel like she is trying to reread or inspect what is on the screen
the phone is now much closer to her face
the framing becomes a tight close-up naturally from physical phone movement
small handheld shake continues
she stares at the screen in disbelief
she keeps the phone close and continues reading
one hand can hover near the mouth or cheek naturally
tiny raw handheld tremor remains visible
no dialogue, only natural room tone

priority_notes: the move closer must feel like curious shocked rereading, not random pickup
the hand-on-mouth gesture must read clearly on screen
the shock reaction must be fully visible by second 3
the tighter framing must come from real phone movement toward her face
